# DeepTab

> DeepTab is a Python library for tabular deep learning built on PyTorch and Lightning.
> It provides a unified scikit-learn-compatible API for a wide range of deep learning
> architectures for tabular data, including MLP, ResNet, FT-Transformer, Mambular,
> TabTransformer, SAINT, NODE, TabM, TabR, AutoInt, and more.

## Getting started

- Overview: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/getting_started/overview.html
- Installation: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/getting_started/installation.html
- Quickstart: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/getting_started/quickstart.html
- Core concepts: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/core_concepts/sklearn_api.html
- Classification example: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/tutorials/imbalance_classification.html
- Regression example: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/tutorials/skewed_regression.html
- Distributional regression example: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/tutorials/uncertainty_quantification.html

## API reference

- Models: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/models/index.html
- Configs: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/configs/index.html
- Data utilities: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/data/index.html
- Distributions: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/distributions/index.html
- Metrics: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/metrics/index.html
- Training: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/training/index.html

## Developer guide

- Contributing: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/developer_guide/contributing.html
- Build and release: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/developer_guide/release.html
- Model promotion policy: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/developer_guide/model_promotion_policy.html
- Support matrix: https://deeptab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/developer_guide/support_matrix.html

## Project links

- Source: https://github.com/OpenTabular/DeepTab
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/deeptab/
- Issue tracker: https://github.com/OpenTabular/DeepTab/issues
